focusAreas: Verify aria-labelledby still added correctly by theme_block_props
Verify heading element has matching id attribute with pattern {block-id}-heading
Verify ThemeHeading renders correctly without headingId prop
Verify both layout modes (beside/above) still work

build.details: Build completed successfully with no TypeScript errors. Only pre-existing asset size warnings present.

lint.details: Only pre-existing warnings for experimental API usage (__experimentalToggleGroupControl, __experimentalToggleGroupControlOption). No new errors or warnings introduced by the changes to Form.tsx or parts/ThemeHeading.tsx.

registration.details: All checks passed: schema valid, naming correct, file references exist, no child block issues, attribute types valid.

ariaLabelledby.details: Verified that theme_block_props() automatically adds aria-labelledby to section wrapper. All 7 form block instances have correct aria-labelledby attributes pointing to heading IDs with pattern 'auto-{hash}-heading'.

headingId.details: All heading elements have id attributes matching the pattern expected by theme_block_region_id(). ThemeHeading.php correctly generates IDs using theme_block_region_id() without requiring a headingId prop override.

themeHeadingRendering.details: ThemeHeading component renders correctly in both TSX (editor) and PHP (frontend) without the headingId prop. No visual or functional regressions observed.

layoutModes.details: Both layout modes (beside and above) render correctly across all breakpoints.

beside.details: Two-column layout with sticky heading on left, form on right. Grid classes and sticky positioning work correctly.

above.details: Stacked centered layout with max-width constraint (max-w-175). Text alignment and centering work correctly.

tsxPhpSync.details: TSX and PHP templates produce identical HTML structure. No attribute extraction anti-patterns found.
warnings: Pre-existing: Missing @var docblock for headingPosition, formId (minor - doesn't affect functionality)
Pre-existing: Structure mismatch warning (false positive - TSX includes InspectorControls which is editor-only)

screenshots.details: Full-page screenshots captured at 375px, 768px, 1024px, 1440px across chromium, firefox, and webkit. Total 12 screenshots saved.

Form.php: Removed manual aria-labelledby prop from theme_block_props()
Removed headingId prop from ThemeHeading args
Form.tsx: Removed headingId prop from ThemeHeading component
ThemeHeading.php: Simplified heading id generation to always use theme_block_region_id()
ThemeHeading.tsx: Removed conditional id attribute from heading element

functionalityIntact.idsMatch: PASS - aria-labelledby values match heading id values
functionalityIntact.besideLayout: PASS - Two-column layout with sticky heading works
functionalityIntact.themeHeadingWithoutProp: PASS - ThemeHeading renders correctly without headingId prop

passedChecks: No new lint warnings or errors
Heading elements have correct id attributes
aria-labelledby values match heading id values
